name: BOBCARD EASY
exclusions: fuel transactions do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points are subject to monthly cap
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: First year fee reversal on spending Rs 6,000 within first 60 days
Annual fee waiver on spending Rs 35,000 in a year
additionalBenefits: 5 reward points per Rs 100 on grocery, departmental stores and movie spends
1 reward point per Rs 100 on other categories
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Eligibility details to be confirmed during Bank of Baroda application
selfEmployed: Eligibility details to be confirmed during Bank of Baroda application
